questions.text: What fraction of a clockwise revolution does the hour hand turn through when it goes from 3 to 9?
questions.explanation: From 3 to 9 is 6 hours. One complete revolution is 12 hours. So, 6/12 = 1/2 of a revolution.

questions.text: An angle measuring 180 degrees is called a straight angle.
questions.explanation: A straight angle measures exactly 180 degrees and forms a straight line.

questions.text: How many degrees are there in a complete revolution?
questions.explanation: A complete revolution (full circle) measures 360 degrees. This is the standard unit for measuring angles.

questions.text: A triangle with all three sides equal is called an ________ triangle.
questions.explanation: An equilateral triangle has all three sides equal in length and all three angles equal to 60 degrees.
